# Google Home APIs Android SDK

Local Maven repository for Google Home APIs Android SDK 1.9.1.

- Maven artifacts: `play-services-home:17.1.0` and `play-services-home-types:17.1.0`
- Source archive: `home.android.sdk_1_9_1.zip`
- Source URL: `https://storage.googleapis.com/home_sdk_android/home.android.sdk_1_9_1.zip`
- Only runtime Maven metadata, POM files and AAR files are vendored. Javadocs are intentionally excluded.

Use is subject to the Android Software Development Kit License referenced by each artifact POM.
